mapper.sql: Id, manname, phone, systemnum, signpic, username, password, email, created, updated, sex, orderid, creditcard, age, health, cardtype, updatetag, userid, companyname, addr, addr2, type, status, buycount, recordcount, customertype, sourceid, comment, addrcode, companyid, hangye, guimo, zhizao
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from tb_customer
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_customer (Id, manname, phone, systemnum, signpic, username, password, email, created, updated, sex, orderid, creditcard, age, health, cardtype, updatetag, userid, companyname, addr, addr2, type, status, buycount, recordcount, customertype, sourceid, comment, addrcode, companyid, hangye, guimo, zhizao ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{manname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{systemnum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{signpic,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{creditcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{age,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{health,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cardtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{buycount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{recordcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customertype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sourceid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addrcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{hangye,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{guimo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zhizao,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into tb_customer
Id,
manname,
phone,
systemnum,
signpic,
username,
password,
email,

updated,
sex,

customertype,

comment,
addrcode,
companyid,
hangye,
guimo,
zhizao,

mapper.update:
update tb_customer
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
manname = #{record.manname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{record.phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
systemnum = #{record.systemnum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
signpic = #{record.signpic,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
username = #{record.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
password = #{record.password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{record.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created = #{record.created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated = #{record.updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
sex = #{record.sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderid = #{record.orderid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
creditcard = #{record.creditcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
age = #{record.age,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
health = #{record.health,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cardtype = #{record.cardtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updatetag = #{record.updatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
userid = #{record.userid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
companyname = #{record.companyname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addr = #{record.addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addr2 = #{record.addr2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{record.type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
buycount = #{record.buycount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
recordcount = #{record.recordcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customertype = #{record.customertype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sourceid = #{record.sourceid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
comment = #{record.comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addrcode = #{record.addrcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
companyid = #{record.companyid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
hangye = #{record.hangye,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
guimo = #{record.guimo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zhizao = #{record.zhizao,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update tb_customer set Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, manname = #{record.manname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{record.phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, systemnum = #{record.systemnum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, signpic = #{record.signpic,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, username = #{record.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password = #{record.password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{record.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created = #{record.created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated = #{record.updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, sex = #{record.sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orderid = #{record.orderid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, creditcard = #{record.creditcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, age = #{record.age,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, health = #{record.health,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cardtype = #{record.cardtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updatetag = #{record.updatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, userid = #{record.userid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, companyname = #{record.companyname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, addr = #{record.addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, addr2 = #{record.addr2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{record.type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, buycount = #{record.buycount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, recordcount = #{record.recordcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, customertype = #{record.customertype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sourceid = #{record.sourceid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, comment = #{record.comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, addrcode = #{record.addrcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, companyid = #{record.companyid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, hangye = #{record.hangye,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, guimo = #{record.guimo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zhizao = #{record.zhizao,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update tb_customer
manname = #{manname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
systemnum = #{systemnum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
signpic = #{signpic,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created = #{created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated = #{updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderid = #{orderid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
creditcard = #{creditcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
age = #{age,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
health = #{health,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cardtype = #{cardtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updatetag = #{updatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
userid = #{userid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
companyname = #{companyname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addr = #{addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addr2 = #{addr2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
buycount = #{buycount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
recordcount = #{recordcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customertype = #{customertype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sourceid = #{sourceid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
comment = #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addrcode = #{addrcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
companyid = #{companyid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
hangye = #{hangye,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
guimo = #{guimo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zhizao = #{zhizao,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update tb_customer set manname = #{manname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, systemnum = #{systemnum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, signpic = #{signpic,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created = #{created,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated = #{updated,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orderid = #{orderid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, creditcard = #{creditcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, age = #{age,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, health = #{health,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cardtype = #{cardtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updatetag = #{updatetag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, userid = #{userid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, companyname = #{companyname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, addr = #{addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, addr2 = #{addr2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, buycount = #{buycount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, recordcount = #{recordcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, customertype = #{customertype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sourceid = #{sourceid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, comment = #{comment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, addrcode = #{addrcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, companyid = #{companyid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, hangye = #{hangye,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, guimo = #{guimo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zhizao = #{zhizao,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
